title: CarbonPass anonymised sector benchmark row
description: Open-data give-back spec for anonymised SME manufacturing benchmarks (first target: the Gangshan–Luzhu fastener cluster). A row is an AGGREGATE over at least 5 firms (k-anonymity floor) — publishers MUST NOT emit rows below that floor, and firm-level observations never leave the firm's device. Rows built from modelled/synthetic data MUST set synthetic=true and say so in provenance. Anyone (MOENV, TIFI, MIRDC, researchers) can publish compatible rows.

cn_prefix.description: CN (Combined Nomenclature) code prefix the row aggregates, e.g. "7318".

metric.description: loss_pct: whole-chain material loss, mass basis, percent of steel input (mass counted before cutting — scrap inside the declared SEE, IR 2025/2547 Annex III §F). kwh_per_tonne: process electricity per tonne of good shipped.

n_firms.description: Number of distinct firms aggregated. The schema itself enforces the k-anonymity floor: rows with n_firms < 5 are invalid.

percentiles.description: Distribution summary. No firm-identifying values (min/max are deliberately absent: in thin buckets they identify firms).

synthetic.description: true while the row is modelled/seeded rather than measured. Consumers MUST display this label.

provenance.description: How the row was built and when — dated. E.g. "pilot intake, 7 firms, 2026-10" or "synthetic seed — documented 5–15% band".
